_meta.description: 1688 search terms for all blue ocean AliExpress categories. Task 1 uses these to discover products.

RetroHairClips.notes: Retro-style hair clips — structurally brand-safe, high Etsy demand

PunkHairAccessories.notes: Punk/gothic hair accessories — spikes, skull clips, safety-pin barrettes

VintageHeadbands.notes: Vintage/boho style headbands — wide fabric, knotted, floral

RetroBodyChain.notes: Retro/boho body/waist chains — strong Etsy seller, brand-safe

VintageBrooches.notes: Vintage brooches & enamel lapel pins — safe if original (non-character) designs

PunkJewelryFindings.notes: Punk rivet/spike/chain components — jewelry findings, structurally brand-impossible

RetroKeychains.notes: Retro-themed keychains (cassettes, cameras, vintage motifs) — brand-safe
